title: Caelesti Fenestra
description: Caelesti Fenestra adds the connected back face glass of Caelesti
body:
Caelesti Fenestra adds the regular, coloured, and tinted glass from Caelesti, complete with custom back faced models, connected textures, unique item models, and custom particles.

Update 2 introduces the glass panes, and optional back face glass panes, which can be enabled using [ResPackOpts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts).

To stay up to date with the development of Caelesti, you can subscribe to my [YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/@skalibercaelesti/videos) where I frequently post updates to the pack and its' many unique and novel features.
